Navigate to the login page and attempt to log in with email 'test@example.com' and password 'password123'

</data>

Plan out as many actions as possible, but stopping at the point where you will need to observe to plan further.
</instructions>

Answer in JSON using this schema:
{
  // What is the most actions you can safely take at once?
  reasoning: string,
  // Always provide at least one action
  actions: [
    {
      // ONLY once you have seen sufficient evidence of the task's completion, mark it as done
      variant: "task:done",
      // Specific observed evidence that verifies the task's completion. Do NOT predict this evidence.
      evidence: string,
    } or {
      // Use if task was attempted but does not seem possible. Use common sense
      variant: "task:fail",
    } or {
      // Click something
      variant: "mouse:click",
      x: int,
      y: int,
    } or {
      variant: "mouse:double_click",
      x: int,
      y: int,
    } or {
      variant: "mouse:right_click",
      x: int,
      y: int,
    } or {
      // Hover mouse over target and scroll
      variant: "mouse:scroll",
      x: int,
      y: int,
      // Pixels to scroll horizontally
      deltaX: int,
      // Pixels to scroll vertically
      deltaY: int,
    } or {
      // Click and hold mouse in one location and release in another
      variant: "mouse:drag",
      from: {
        x: int,
        y: int,
      },
      to: {
        x: int,
        y: int,
      },
    } or {
      // Open and switch to a new tab
      variant: "browser:tab:new",
    } or {
      // Switch to a tab that is already open
      variant: "browser:tab:switch",
      // Index of tab to switch to
      index: int,
    } or {
      // Navigate to a URL directly
      variant: "browser:nav",
      // URL to navigate to
      url: string,
    } or {
      // Make sure to click where you need to type first
      variant: "keyboard:type",
      // Content to type
      content: string,
    } or {
      variant: "keyboard:enter",
    } or {
      variant: "keyboard:tab",
    } or {
      variant: "keyboard:backspace",
    } or {
      // Select all content in the active text area (CTRL+A)
      variant: "keyboard:select_all",
    } or {
      // Actions include smart waiting automatically - so only use this when a significant additional wait is clearly required.
      variant: "wait",
      seconds: float,
    }
  ],
}
